title: glehnia littoralis var. leiocarpa
intro: Glehnia littoralis var. leiocarpa, also known as Korean angelica or Chinese angelica root, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family that is native to China and Korea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Glehnia littoralis var. leiocarpa include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as potentially treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Glehnia littoralis var. leiocarpa include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
